title: Franchise a Pure Barre
meta_description: Pure Barre is a full-body workout that transforms you physically and mentally. Our musically-driven group classes focus on low-impact, high-intensity movements that strengthen and tone your body in 50 minutes or less.
h1:
Why own a Pure Barre?
 
why own a
pure barre?

body_markdown:
# 
Why own a Pure Barre?
![Group smiling at studio mirror while doing barre exercises ](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/jpg/Franchise/international/international-hero.jpg)
![PureBarre_Social_ProfilePhoto_Small \(3\)](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/PureBarre_Social_ProfilePhoto_Small%20\(3\).png?width=60&height=60&name=PureBarre_Social_ProfilePhoto_Small%20\(3\).png)
##  _own a pure barre studio_
With almost 650 studios, and over 100,000 active members, Pure Barre is the largest, most-established barre brand, offering a variety of low-impact, full-body workouts for a broad range of fitness levels. Ranked in Entrepreneur Magazine’s Franchise 500 List each year, Pure Barre continues to be a pioneer in not only the barre space but boutique fitness overall.
[ Get More Info ](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise-form)
![Group sitting on the floor while working out with resistance bands](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/jpg/Franchise/welcome-to-pure-barre.jpg)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  Leading The Industry Through Numbers
650+
open studios
6,000+
teachers worldwide 
100k+
active members 
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  benefits of owning a pure barre studio 
strong national brand
Not only is Pure Barre the largest barre brand, it is one of the largest franchised fitness brands with close to 650 locations open across North America. 
invest in your life
Enjoy a low-cost entry, a recurring revenue model, and the confidence that our corporate team has decades of combined experience in fitness franchising. 
always evolving
The Pure Barre member experience in-studio is ever-changing with consistent updates to our class choreography and music, as well as the introduction of new classes and programming.
executive model
Our franchise model provides a completely scalable business, allowing you to determine your own success. Leverage development costs and national vendor relationships to launch your studio successfully.
[ GET MORE INFO ](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise-form)
![Pure Barre instructor guiding group working out with wrist weights](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/jpg/Homepage/benefits-bakground.jpeg)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  Comprehensive Support For Your Success
We believe extensive support & comprehensive training is pivotal for your success as a Pure Barre Franchise Owner.
![Building](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/svg/Franchise/real-estate.svg)
real estate
Our dedicated staff will help you in the site selection & lease negotiation process with our vendor relationships to find the ideal site for your Pure Barre studio.
![Cog wheel with two crossed wrenches in the center ](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/svg/Franchise/construction-design.svg)
construction & design
We'll guide you through the entire build - out process from approved layout and general construction, to interior design, music and technology. 
![Sales increase icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/svg/Franchise/sales.svg)
sales
Enjoy comprehensive & ongoing sales training, monthly calls & expert guidance from pre-sale through to Grand Opening & into sustainability. Get introduced to our multi-channel sales process to drive sales from the start!
![Magnifying glass with person icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/svg/Franchise/recruitment.svg)
recruitment
The quality of the teacher and instruction defines a class - receive assistance hiring the most qualified instructors, general managers & sales team.
![Megaphone icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/svg/Franchise/marketing.svg)
marketing
The minute you sign your LOI, the marketing of your location begins, with personalized support to set you up with all means of generating website traffic and memberships. If you buy an existing studio, expect the same incredible, personalized support to set you up for success!
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  _as featured in_

[ View Press ](https://www.purebarre.com/press)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  the franchise experience
_"There's genuine compassion from Pure Barre. They're vested in all aspects of the business. We exceeded goals. We broke records. That was really a bonus for everything else that came with it, which was the joy of the studio."_
**Lanie Marinelli | Colorado**
![the pure barre franchise experience](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/jpg/Homepage/franchise-experience-background.jpg)
The Franchise Experience
![](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise)
##  _Ready to Learn More About Opening Your Pure Barre Studio?_
[ get more info ](https://www.purebarre.com/franchise-form)
This information is not intended as an offer to sell, or the solicitation of an offer to buy, a franchise. It is for information purposes only. Currently, the following states regulate the offer and sale of franchises: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Oregon, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin. If you are a resident of one of these states, we will not offer you a franchise unless and until we have complied with applicable pre‑sale registration and disclosure requirements in your jurisdiction. FOR THE STATE OF NEW YORK: This advertisement is not an offering. An offering can only be made by a prospectus filed first with the Department of Law of the State of New York. Such filing does not constitute approval by the Department of Law. FOR THE STATE OF MINNESOTA: MN Franchise Registration Numbers: PB Franchising SPV, LLC (File No. 10694). 17877 Von Karman Ave., Suite 100, Irvine, California 92614; telephone number (949) 346-3000.
